title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Nagaland University Act, 1989. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 6th September, 1994, vide notification No. S.O. 644(E), dated 6th September, 1994, see Gazette of India, 1994, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
